'''Hatras Nikk''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]]. She used her charm to attract—and then rob—rich Human visitors. She was wanted for this by [[Rozatta]] because it must have been damaging her business. Her [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]], worth 2,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 1,000 [[Death/Legends|dead]], was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
